comment: JetBrains IDE public preview subset of this repository's hook configuration. Includes only hook events supported by JetBrains as of 2026-03-11.

userPromptSubmitted.comment: Log each submitted user prompt for audit and usage tracking

preToolUse.comment: Block create/edit of sensitive files (.env, .pem, .key, secrets/)
Prevent agents from modifying hook governance files
Enforce conventional commit message format on git commit commands
Require test files when committing source changes

postToolUse.comment: Validate JSON syntax after any .json file is edited

errorOccurred.comment: Log hook and tool errors for troubleshooting and audit trail
